heading: Custom-built web software, designed and shipped end to end.
paragraphs: Hi — I'm Wesley and WesDev is my studio. I'm a **Cape Town-based developer** with design and flow at the centre of everything I build.

I work end to end, from first wireframe to final deploy, and I build everything from scratch. **No page builders, no bloated templates,** just clean code that the next engineer can actually read and a product that works for the people using it.

I care about the unglamorous parts that make a site last: **fast load times, accessible markup, sane state management,** and SEO that earns real traffic. Design and engineering live under one roof, so what you sign off on is what ships.
You work directly with me throughout. **No hand-offs, no surprises,** just a build that goes from rough idea to something you're proud to put live.
imageAlt: Portrait of Wesley, founder of WesDev
